song_name: Training Season - Dance The Night - Houdini
version_description: Training Season / Dance The Night / Houdini live at the GRAMMYs 2024.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
- Training Season -

[Intro]
[ch]Fm[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                                 [ch]C[/ch]
Are you someone that I can give my heart to?[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]Fm[/ch]
Or just the poison that I'm drawn to[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]C[/ch]
It can be hard to tell the difference late at night[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]
Play fair[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]C[/ch]
Is that a compass in your nature?[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]Fm[/ch]
Or are you tricky 'cause I've been there?[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]C[/ch]
And baby, I don’t need to learn that lesson twice[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Fm[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Bbm[/ch]
         But if you really wanna go there[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
You should know I[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]
Need someone to hold me close[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]
Deeper than I've ever know[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]
Whose love feels like a rodeo[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]Fm[/ch]
Knows just how to take control[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Fm[/ch]
When I'm vulnerable[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]
He's straight talking to my soul[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Conversation overload[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]Fm[/ch]
Got me feeling vertigo[/tab]

[Post-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]
    Are you somebody who can go there?[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]Fm[/ch]
'Cause I don't wanna have to show ya[/tab]
[tab]                                         [ch]C[/ch]
'Cause, baby, if you're good then let me know ya[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]Fm[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Fm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Bbm[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
'Cause training season's over[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                            [ch]C[/ch]
I tried to see my lovers in a good light[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Fm[/ch]
Don't wanna do it just to be nice[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]C[/ch]
Don't wanna have to teach you how to love me right[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
I hope it hits me like an arrow[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Fm[/ch]
Someone with some potential[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]C[/ch]
Is it too much to ask for?[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                  [ch]Fm[/ch]
Who understands I need someone to hold me close[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]
Deeper than I've ever know[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]
Whose love feels like a rodeo[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]Fm[/ch]
Knows just how to take control?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Fm[/ch]
When I'm vulnerable[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]
He's straight talking to my soul[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Conversation overload[/tab]

[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]Fm[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Fm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Bbm[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
'Cause training season's over[/tab]

- Dance The Night -

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]           [ch]A7[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Cmaj13[/ch]
Even when the tears are flowing like diamonds on my face[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]              [ch]A7[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Cmaj13[/ch]
I still keep the party going, not one hair out of place (Yes, I can)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]            [ch]A7[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Cmaj13[/ch]
Even when the tears are flowing like diamonds on my face (Yes, I can, yes, I can)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]              [ch]A7[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Cmaj13[/ch]
I still keep the party going, not one hair out of place[/tab]

N.C.
Watch me, daaaaaance

- Houdini -

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Time is passin' like a solar eclipse[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
  See you watchin' then you blow me a kiss[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
It's your moment, baby, don't let it slip[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Comin' closer, are you readin' my lips?[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Dm[/ch]
They say I come and I go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Tell me all the ways you need me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]Dm[/ch]
I'm not here for long[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]
Catch me or I go, Houdini[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Dm[/ch]
I come and I go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]
Prove you got the right to please me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Dm[/ch]
Everybody knows[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]
Catch me or I go, Houdini[/tab]


[Post-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Dm[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]
If you're good enough, you'll find a way[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]Dm[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]
  Maybe you could cause a girl to change (Her ways)[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dm[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
Do you think about it night and day?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]Dm[/ch]               N.C.
  Maybe you could be the one to make me stay[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
  Everything you say is soundin' so sweet (Ah-ah)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
  But do you practice everything that you preach? (Ah-ah)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
  I need something that'll make me believe (Ah-ah)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
  If you got it, baby, give it to me[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Dm[/ch]
They say I come and I go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Tell me all the ways you need me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]Dm[/ch]
I'm not here for long[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]
Catch me or I go, Houdini[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Dm[/ch]
I come and I go (I come and I go)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]
Prove you got the right to please me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Dm[/ch]
Everybody knows (I’m not here for long)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]
Catch me or I go, Houdini[/tab]


[Post-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Dm[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]
If you're good enough, you'll find a way[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]Dm[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]
  Maybe you could cause a girl to change (Her ways)[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dm[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
Do you think about it night and day?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]Dm[/ch]                              [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]
  Maybe you could be the one to make me stay[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab]   [ch]F[/ch]
Oh-oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Ooh[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
I come and I go[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]
Tell me all the ways you need me (Ooh)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
I'm not here for long[/tab]

Catch me or I go, Houdini
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
I come and I go (I come and I go)[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]
Prove you got the right to please me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Everybody knows (I’m not here for long)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]Am[/ch]
Catch me or I go, Houdini[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]
Houdini[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Catch me or I go, Houdini[/tab]
